title: A Song Long Ago.
content:
Through the pauses of thy fervid singing
            Fell crystal sound
    That thy fingers from the keys were flinging
            Lightly around:
    I felt the vine-like harmonies close clinging
            About my soul;
    And to my eyes, as fruit of their sweet bringing,
            The full tear stole!
meaning:
George Parsons Lathrop's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Song Long Ago."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
